Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha and Omar Abou-Ismail make miso soup and a bean-free hummus with flatbread made with raw ingredients; Martha and Omar whip up a tabouli salad followed by sweet potato fries.
Video.title: The Art of Raw Food

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha makes steamed: chicken, fish, mussels with wine and saffron, salmon and peas.
Video.title: Steaming

Video.summary: Martha roasts: chicken, beef tenderloin, autumn salad, brussels sprouts, herb potatoes.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha tours Breads Bakery with owner Gadi Paleg and learns about their award-winning baked goods; Martha and bakers make Breads Bakery's baguette, challah, and egg sandwich.
Video.title: Baking Baguettes and Breads

Video.summary: Chef David Burke brings his modern classic dishes to Martha's kitchen; a bacon clothesline, calamari noodles, miso chicken with ginger and vegetables, and key lime pie are on the menu.
Video.title: Chef David Burke's Modern Classics

Video.summary: Martha visits Il Buco Alimentari with chef Justin Smillie and fries artichokes to crispy perfection; they construct a salad with anchovy crumbs followed by spaghetti bottarga and charred duck.
Video.title: Rustic Italian Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha dines at the Korean restaurant NARO and begins her culinary journey with two Korean cocktails; Martha and executive chef Nate Kuester make reimagined versions of traditional Korean cuisine.
Video.title: Exploring Korean Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha shares recipes and storage tips for homemade stock: chicken, beef, vegetable.
Video.title: Stocks

Video.summary: Martha invites butcher Evan Lobel to show how to choose and cook the best cuts of meat.
Video.title: Butchering

Video.summary: Martha makes rice: fluffy white rice, rice pilaf, Thai-style fried rice.
Video.title: Rice

Video.summary: Martha makes homemade dressings: vinaigrette two ways, creamy blue cheese, mayonnaise, aioli.
Video.title: Dressings and Emulsions

Video.summary: Martha braises "low and slow" dishes: pot roast, braised cabbage, pulled pork shoulder.
Video.title: Braising

Video.summary: Martha shares tasty breakfast favorites made with yeast: hazelnut hot-cross buns, honey whole-wheat bread, and pull-apart whole-wheat monkey bread
Video.title: Yeasted Breakfast Favorites

Video.summary: Martha makes better-for-you bake sale classics: lemon-yogurt cupcakes with raspberry frosting, whole-wheat sticky buns, orange-barley pound cake, and fluffy whey biscuits
Video.title: Better (For You) Bake Sale

Video.summary: Martha transforms bread recipes using alternative flours: honey-wheat Parker House rolls, whole-wheat pita, and tasty molasses-oat bread. Plus, tips for making honey butter
Video.title: Breads and Rolls

Video.summary: Martha makes three wholesome recipes that'll make you never skip breakfast again: Irish-style brown bread, airy whole-wheat popovers, and whole-wheat date nut bread
Video.title: Wholesome Breakfast

Video.summary: Kevin Sharkey makes mint juleps and deviled eggs; a Churchill Downs Racetrack centerpiece; chef Pierre Schaedelin walks Martha through food preparation for the party; Martha gets fitted by hat milliner Jackie Ciconga for the perfect Derby ensemble.
Video.title: Martha Hosts a Derby Party

Video.summary: Homa Dashtaki, owner of the White Moustache yogurt company, shares her technique for making yogurt; Persian rice with a yogurt dip and whey pancakes.
Video.title: All Things Yogurt

Video.summary: Martha and Salad Freak author Jess Dameck reveal the art of constructing the perfect salad; Martha and Sarah Carey share a new twist on the classic Caesar salad and create a roasted beet salad.
Video.title: Sensational Summer Salads

Video.summary: Martha takes your baking skills to the next level with boulangerie bread recipes.
Video.title: Decorative Breads

Video.summary: Follow Martha as she creates delicious breakfast pastries with an easy-to-prepare yeast dough.
Video.title: Breakfast Pastries

Video.summary: Martha teaches techniques to transform your favorite tarts into showstoppers.
Video.title: Fanciful Tarts

Video.summary: Belgian Fence for Growing Pears (Espalier), Boning a Whole Chicken, Chicken Stock
Video.title: Belgian Fence Espalier, Chicken Stock

Video.summary: Espresso, Scissors Good Thing, Planting Trees
Video.title: Espresso, Planting Trees

Video.summary: Rhubarb Crisp, Hanging Baskets, Iced Vodka Good Thing, Vegetable Garden
Video.title: Rhubarb Crisp, Hanging Baskets, Iced Vodka

Image.alt: Rhubarb Crisp, Hanging Baskets, Iced Vodka
Rhubarb Crisp, Hanging Baskets, Iced Vodka
Rhubarb Crisp, Hanging Baskets, Iced Vodka

Video.summary: Asparagus Planting, Asparagus Preparation, Trees as Gifts Good Thing, Spring Perennial Border
Video.title: Asparagus, Spring Perennial Border

Video.summary: Basic Herb Garden, Painting Furniture White, Coffee and Tea Ice Cubes Good Thing, Bamboo Good Thing
Video.title: Basic Herb Garden, Coffee Ice Cubes, Bamboo

Image.alt: Basic Herb Garden, Coffee Ice Cubes, Bamboo
Basic Herb Garden, Coffee Ice Cubes, Bamboo
Basic Herb Garden, Coffee Ice Cubes, Bamboo

Video.summary: Garden Favorites: Shade Garden, Lemon Granita, Bushel Basket Good Thing, Iris Planting
Video.title: Shade Garden, Lemon Granita, Irises

Video.summary: Pickling Green Tomatoes, Building a Garden Trellis, Grilled Pizza
Video.title: Pickling Green Tomatoes, Grilled Pizza

Video.summary: Teapot Shipping, Dividing Perennials, Lawn Aeration, Iggy's Bakery (Field Trip), Roasted Tomatoes
Video.title: Perennials, Lawn Aeration, Roasted Tomatoes

Video.summary: Artichoke Hearts, Poached Eggs, Eggs Benedict
Video.title: Artichoke Hearts, Poached Eggs, Eggs Benedict

Image.alt: Artichoke Hearts, Poached Eggs, Eggs Benedict
Artichoke Hearts, Poached Eggs, Eggs Benedict
Artichoke Hearts, Poached Eggs, Eggs Benedict
